sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Lightship Scrolling Shooter Mode
special_mechanics.description: Air Base approach phase where player controls a lightship in scrolling shooter gameplay with dodge mechanics and resource collection

physics_values.notes: Single hit destroys ship; Japanese version requires restart from beginning, US version respawns at destruction point if extra lives available

special_mechanics.name: Fortress Exploration Mode
special_mechanics.description: Action-adventure interior phase with maze navigation, combat, core destruction, and timed escape sequence

physics_values.notes: Fortress explodes after core destruction with short escape window; exit location randomized from entry point

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources contain game design overview, development history, and reception notes but lack precise physics parameters. TCRF source includes uncompiled ASM code with memory addresses and variable names but no decoded physics constants. Wikipedia source provides gameplay descriptions but no quantitative movement data.
